_about: Handcrafted find-by-description queries over Python stdlib packages. Ground truth = bare symbol names exposed by the target package. Purpose: evaluate whether the 0.75/0.02 low-confidence threshold on find_library_symbol_by_description has actual signal on library lookups (as opposed to the code_retrieval bench which killed the same threshold on project-code lookup).

queries.query: serialize a python dict into a JSON string
write a python object as JSON to a file handle
parse a JSON string back into python data
read JSON from a file-like object
customise how non-standard python objects are encoded as JSON
hook to turn parsed JSON objects into custom python classes
represent a filesystem path in an object-oriented way
windows-specific path with drive letters and backslashes
compile a regular expression pattern once for repeated use
check whether a pattern matches the start of a string
find every occurrence of a pattern in a string
replace every occurrence of a pattern with a replacement
escape a string so it can be used as a literal regex pattern
split a string on a pattern boundary
